name: JotForm
description: JotForm online form builder for data collection and workflow automation

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to JotForm
2. Go to Account Settings → API
3. Create a new API key with appropriate permissions
4. Paste it below

credentialFields.label: API Key
credentialFields.helpText: JotForm → Account Settings → API → Create API Key

checks.name: Employee Access
checks.description: Verifies JotForm account access and user management
